mapper.sql: id, appeal_config_id, step_order, step_name, approver_type, approver_role_code, approver_user_id, approver_dept_code, sign_mode, is_required, trigger_condition, timeout_hours, timeout_action, remind_interval_hours, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM appeal_approval_configs WHERE appeal_config_id = #{appealConfigId} ORDER BY step_order ASC

SELECT
FROM appeal_approval_configs WHERE appeal_config_id = #{appealConfigId} AND is_required = 1 ORDER BY step_order ASC

SELECT
FROM appeal_approval_configs WHERE appeal_config_id = #{appealConfigId} AND is_required = 0 ORDER BY step_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO appeal_approval_configs (appeal_config_id, step_order, step_name, approver_type, approver_role_code, approver_user_id, approver_dept_code, sign_mode, is_required, trigger_condition, timeout_hours, timeout_action, remind_interval_hours, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.appealConfigId}, #{item.stepOrder}, #{item.stepName}, #{item.approverType}, #{item.approverRoleCode}, #{item.approverUserId}, #{item.approverDeptCode}, #{item.signMode}, #{item.isRequired}, #{item.triggerCondition}, #{item.timeoutHours}, #{item.timeoutAction}, #{item.remindIntervalHours}, NOW(), NOW())
